title: Paul Revere "The British Are Coming" Painting
about: Paul Revere "The British Are Coming" Painting, also known as How I Feel After Telling Everyone X or simply Paul Revere Meme, refers to a series of image macro memes using the "Midnight Ride of Paul Revere" painting by Edward Mason Eggleston and other paintings related to the historical event in which American Paul Revere's midnight ride to warn American colonists about the British troops who were poised to attack in 1775. The meme started on TikTok in early November 2024, often used to warn people in fandoms of major news like a new album release, game announcement, anime project or gossip. The trend is also accompanied by the "U.S. Army Old Guard Fife and Drum Corps" band sound.
origin: On May 4th, 2024, TikTok[5] user @_giomama_uploaded the earliest online example of "The British Are Coming" meme, using the "Midnight Ride of Paul Revere" painting[2] by Edward Mason Eggleston as a reaction meme, mentioning Kendrick Lamar's "Not Like Us" diss track release. The post read, "How I feel telling my friends Kendrick dropped a THIRD song," and amassed over 694,000 plays and 191,000 likes in a year.
